ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "elapsed_time" REAL /* Elapsed time for the metric period */,
  "window_time" REAL /* Time window for the metric */,
  "total_requests" INTEGER /* Total number of requests during the period */,
  "successful_requests" INTEGER /* Number of successful requests during the period */,
  "failed_requests" INTEGER /* Number of failed requests during the period */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time for the period */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate (failed requests / total requests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the service (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of the service (e.g., web, API, database) */,
  "sla" TEXT /* Service Level Agreement (SLA) for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the location (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "service_tier" TEXT /* Service tier of the client (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_service_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mapping (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_service_mapping_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_service_mapping_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_location_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mapping (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_location_mapping_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_location_mapping_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_client_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mapping (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_client_mapping_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_client_mapping_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
